variants: Soraya Filali, born in Gingerbark Fields, is a celebrated inventor and musician. She currently resides in Starcaller Crescent, where she has continued to expand her creative pursuits. One of her notable achievements includes being awarded the Crimson Orchid Medal for her contributions to the world of technology and art. In addition to her accolades, Soraya authored the innovative Magnetic Falcon System, which has received attention in technical circles. She is also an active member of the Thunderwood Percussionists, a group dedicated to advancing percussion music.

Alongside her inventive career, she engages with the Thunderwood Percussionists, where her passion for music thrives. Soraya's contributions to both technology and art reflect her diverse talents.
